column1: # Illustrative hand-built sample of scripts/names.py output — NOT the real
# artifact. The full data/lexicons/ru-names.tsv (~hundreds of thousands of
# forms) is generated on a dev machine from the Natasha name dictionaries
# This sample exists so reviewers can see the exact schema and confirm it
# Note the dedup: Иванова is both gent and accs of Иванов (sing); the nomn-first
# case order keeps a single deterministic tag per surface form.
